title: pinus tabuliformis var. henryi
intro: Pinus tabuliformis var. henryi, also known as Henry's Chinese pine, is a variety of pine tree native to China. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, derived from its essential oils and resin. The health benefits of Pinus tabuliformis var. henryi include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions, essential oil extracts, and resin tinctures, which can be used to promote respiratory health and soothe skin conditions.
